tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Define account profiles schema
tasks.description:
Define the 3-account profile structure for Yubin v2:
- maia.quiddam@gmail.com → mode=full_agent, own_digest=true, telegram=true
- rennesan@gmail.com → mode=read_only_alerting, own_digest=true, telegram=true
- maia.quiddam@outlook.com → mode=forward, forward_to=maia.quiddam@gmail.com, tag_subject=[via-Outlook]

Store in maia.db (new table yubin_accounts) or yubin_accounts.json. No hardcoded values.

tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Implement full_agent mode (maia.quiddam@gmail.com)
tasks.description: Wire maia.quiddam@gmail.com as a full agent: reads inbox, drafts + sends replies, runs through the LLM chain. Must respect the per-account digest flag and Telegram flag from the schema in tyub01.

tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Implement read_only_alerting mode (rennesan@gmail.com)
tasks.description: Wire rennesan@gmail.com as read-only with alerting: Yubin may READ and CLASSIFY messages, may push summaries to digest + Telegram, but may NOT draft, send, archive, label, or modify any mail. Writes must be blocked — see tyub04 for the guard.

tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Write-guard middleware for read_only_alerting
tasks.description:
Centralized middleware that intercepts ALL Gmail write ops (send, reply, draft, modify labels, archive, trash) and rejects them when account.mode === 'read_only_alerting'. Raises YubinWriteBlockedError. Must log every blocked attempt for audit.

SAFETY-CRITICAL: rennesan@gmail.com must never send automated mail.

tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Outlook forwarder with [via-Outlook] tag
tasks.description: Poll maia.quiddam@outlook.com, forward each new message to maia.quiddam@gmail.com with '[via-Outlook] ' prepended to the subject. Preserve original From/Date in the forwarded body header. Deduplicate to avoid re-forwarding on polling cycles.

tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Per-account digest generator (2 digests)
tasks.description:
Two independent digest jobs, one per account with own_digest=true:
- Maia's digest covers maia.quiddam@gmail.com (including forwarded Outlook mail)
- Renne's digest covers rennesan@gmail.com

Digests render HTML + plaintext, delivered via Telegram (tyub07) and optionally email.

tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Telegram notifications wiring (both accounts)
tasks.description: Per-account Telegram channel/chat routing. Each account's alerts and digest go to its own Telegram target (separate chat IDs in the schema). Suppress Telegram when telegram=false on the account.

tasks.title: Yubin v2 — Smoke tests (all 3 accounts + write-guard)
tasks.description:
Smoke suite covering:
1. maia.quiddam@gmail.com reads + sends a test reply (full_agent happy path)
2. rennesan@gmail.com reads + alerts, WRITE attempt is blocked by tyub04 guard (assert YubinWriteBlockedError)
3. maia.quiddam@outlook.com → forward lands in Maia Gmail with [via-Outlook] prefix
4. Both digests generate + fire to their own Telegram targets

Must pass before the bundle is considered complete.
